prompt: In the GroundX partner integration, executing an MCP tool sometimes fails to decode the upstream response (error: "failed to parse MCP execution response"). Diagnose the cause and fix the response handling so MCP tool executions decode correctly. Do not modify any _test.go file.
source: real cashbot-go commit 2548ec43 'Fix MCP execution response decoding'
ground_truth_notes: Replay of a real shipped bugfix. Setup reverse-applies the commit's code change to pkg/partner/partners/groundx/mcp.go (recreating the bug); the commit's own test (mcp_test.go, kept at HEAD) is the oracle. The real fix decodes gzip/base64-encoded response bodies and stops forwarding the Accept-Encoding header. VERIFIED 2026-06-26: reverse-apply is clean, turns the package test RED, restore turns it GREEN.

prompt: For partner MCP accounts, an auto-generated OpenAPI tool is being exposed that duplicates (shadows) a partner-specific tool; partner accounts should not see that shadowed customer operation. Update the per-account MCP tool registration so the shadowed operation is hidden for partner accounts. Do not modify any _test.go file.
source: real cashbot-go commit 5be28304 'Hide shadowed customer MCP tool for partners'
ground_truth_notes: Replay of a real shipped fix. Setup reverse-applies the code change to pkg/mcp/mcp.go; pkg/mcp test is the oracle. The real fix filters the GET /v1/customer (Customer_get) operation for partner-scoped accounts. VERIFIED 2026-06-26: reverse-apply clean, test RED after reverse, GREEN after restore.

prompt: Valid OAuth token requests are sometimes rejected with 'invalid_grant' because the request's resource URL does not match the stored one when they differ only by normalization. Fix the OAuth authorization_code and refresh_token grant handling so MCP resource URLs are normalized before comparison. Do not modify any _test.go file.
ground_truth_notes: Replay of a real shipped fix. Setup reverse-applies the code change to pkg/partner/partners/groundx/oauth.go; package test is the oracle. The real fix normalizes the MCP resource URL (and the stored code record's resource) before the equality check in the token grant path. VERIFIED 2026-06-26: reverse-apply clean, test RED after reverse, GREEN after restore.

prompt: The ai-server X-Ray layout completion webhook is adding a NEW field to the JSON payload it POSTs back: `engineVersion` (a string identifying the layout model version). Find the service that consumes this layout webhook and update its payload type so the new `engineVersion` field is decoded and available. Make the minimal change required.
source: constructed (no real single-commit cross-repo task exists; coupling is service-level)
ground_truth_notes: Cross-repo graph discriminator (kept from the constructed set). The new field `engineVersion` occurs 0 times in cashbot-go, so it is NOT greppable there; the agent must trace the relationship (ai-server layout webhook -> which service receives it -> the services.Response struct decoded at pkg/processor/documentlayout/handler.go:148, wired by lambda/DocumentLayoutWebhook/main.go). CGC's CALLS_SERVICE edge answers 'who consumes it' directly; baseline must infer (callbackURL -> api.groundx.ai = cashbot-go); Serena cannot span repos. Correct edit: add EngineVersion *string with json tag engineVersion,omitempty to Response. Go's json.Unmarshal ignores unknown fields, so the prompt explicitly asks to capture it.

prompt: ai-server's document layout pipeline now includes an ADDITIONAL field in the JSON result it POSTs back to cashbot-go's DocumentLayoutWebhook callback. The field was added to ai-server's DocumentResponse model. Update cashbot-go's webhook response type at pkg/model/services/response.go so the new field is decoded and available. Determine the field's exact name and type from ai-server's DocumentResponse model and mirror it with the correct JSON tag (match the existing style: pointer + omitempty for optional fields). Make the minimal change. Do not modify any _test.go file.
source: constructed; producer change = ai-server commit 8f404d9 (taskDuration added to DocumentResponse), ai-server re-indexed into Neo4j
ground_truth_notes: Cross-repo retrieval discriminator with REAL isolation. ai-server is PARKED off-disk during A3 cells (park_repos) because --add-dir does not sandbox reads under bypassPermissions. The new field taskDuration (Optional[int]) lives only in ai-server DocumentResponse (commit 8f404d9) and is indexed in Neo4j, so cgc find_code/cypher can retrieve DocumentResponse.source (contains taskDuration) with NO file on disk, while baseline and serena hit file-not-found. taskDuration occurs 0x in cashbot-go. Correct edit: add TaskDuration *int64 json tag taskDuration,omitempty. Expected: cgc/both PASS with mcp>0; baseline/serena FAIL.

prompt: Engineering wants to change the signature of the function PrepareStep (defined in pkg/model/summarizer/process.go). Produce the COMPLETE impact set: every file in cashbot-go that contains a function which transitively calls PrepareStep — directly, or through any chain of intermediate function calls. Use whatever code-navigation tools you have available (including any code-graph or symbol/LSP tools) to trace the call relationships; be exhaustive, not just direct callers. Output ONLY the list, one relative file path per line (e.g. pkg/foo/bar.go). Do not modify any files.
source: constructed; ground truth = Neo4j MATCH (t)-[:CALLS*1..5]->(PrepareStep), 29 caller files, 0 of which contain the string PrepareStep (un-greppable by name)
ground_truth_notes: Efficiency-at-scale test (in-repo; scale = call-graph depth). PrepareStep has 1 direct caller but 69 transitive callers across 30 files; NONE of the 29 non-def impact files contain the string PrepareStep, so grep-by-name cannot find them — baseline must manually BFS the call tree (expensive, likely low recall). cgc can answer with one analyze_code_relationships/Cypher (find_callers, transitive). Scored on RECALL of the 29 ground-truth files in the agent final answer + tokens/turns. Tests both vendor claims: efficiency (tokens) and completeness (recall) when the graph is used.
